tools.name: analyze
tools.description: Run LLM analysis on recent events

flags.name: limit
flags.description: Maximum number of recent events to analyze

tools.name: calibrate
tools.description: Recompute per-op p50 cost hints from .cortex/db/dag_traces.jsonl

flags.name: window
flags.description: Number of trailing rows to consider (0 = use file's rolling window)

tools.name: capture
tools.description: Capture event from stdin (used by AI tools)

flags.name: bulk
flags.description: Bulk mode: read JSONL from stdin and capture each line as an event

tools.name: code
tools.description: Run the Cortex coding harness against a workdir (requires --workdir and --model)

flags.name: api-url
flags.description: Override the model API endpoint (use --local for default Ollama)

flags.name: init
flags.description: Bootstrap an empty workdir before running

flags.name: json
flags.description: Emit a single JSON envelope on stdout

flags.name: no-search
flags.description: Disable Cortex search injection on the turn

flags.name: workdir
flags.description: Required: target directory the agent will edit (use --init to bootstrap fresh)

tools.name: dream-debug
tools.description: Run Dream cycles synchronously and dump regions + fractal metadata

tools.name: embed
tools.description: Embed text to a vector (and optionally store under doc_id/content_type)

flags.name: bulk
flags.description: Read NDJSON {doc_id, content_type?, text} from stdin and store each. Implies --store.

flags.name: content-type
flags.description: Content type bucket for stored embeddings

flags.name: doc-id
flags.description: Content ID to store the embedding under (required when --store is set without --bulk)

flags.name: store
flags.description: Store the resulting vector instead of just emitting it

flags.name: workdir
flags.description: Open storage rooted at <workdir>/.cortex (required with --store or --bulk)

tools.name: eval
tools.description: Run evaluation (subcommands: grid | suite | benchmark; or -s scenario -m model)

flags.name: summary
flags.description: Show lift trend over recent runs

tools.name: feed
tools.description: Seed knowledge from files or directories

flags.name: raw
flags.description: Seed file content verbatim (skip LLM extraction)

tools.name: forget
tools.description: Remove outdated context

tools.name: ingest
tools.description: Move queued events to database

tools.name: init
tools.description: Initialize Cortex in the current directory

flags.name: auto
flags.description: Detect local LLM availability and print setup tips

tools.name: install
tools.description: Ensure .cortex/ is initialized and report local LLM availability

tools.name: journal
tools.description: Journal operations (rebuild, replay, verify, show, tail, migrate, ingest)

tools.name: measure
tools.description: Measure prompt quality for small context windows

flags.name: calibrate
flags.description: Calibrate the prompt-quality model against a corpus of <N> tokens

tools.name: models
tools.description: Detect available models across configured endpoints + Ollama; show recommended role map

tools.name: projects
tools.description: List registered projects

tools.name: prune
tools.description: Check/manage context size relative to project

flags.name: dry-run
flags.description: Show what would be pruned without doing it

tools.name: reembed
tools.description: Re-generate embeddings with current model

tools.name: repl
tools.description: Start an interactive coding REPL in the current directory (default model: qwen2.5-coder:1.5b via Ollama)

tools.name: run
tools.description: Run a DAG by type (turn|think|dream|capture|eval)

flags.name: type
flags.description: DAG type: turn | think | dream | capture | eval

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search context (cognitive retrieval); --type=recent|insights|entities|graph for views

args.name: query
args.description: Search query when --type is unset; view-specific args otherwise

flags.name: json
flags.description: Emit a single JSON envelope on stdout with full result content (no truncation)

flags.name: mode
flags.description: Retrieval mode: fast (Reflex only) or full (Reflex + Reflect)

flags.name: type
flags.description: View type: recent|insights|entities|graph (omit for free-text search)

flags.name: workdir
flags.description: Open storage rooted at <workdir>/.cortex (overrides default global storage)

tools.name: search-vector
tools.description: Vector-search the workdir's storage (--text or --vector); JSON output

flags.name: content-type
flags.description: Filter results to a single content type bucket (empty = no filter)

flags.name: text
flags.description: Query text — embed and search in one shot

flags.name: threshold
flags.description: Minimum similarity score to include (0.0 = no filter)

flags.name: top-k
flags.description: Maximum number of results to return

flags.name: vector
flags.description: Pre-computed query vector as JSON array (alternative to --text)

tools.name: status
tools.description: Show cortex status (default: one-line; --system|--memory|--json|--expand for views)

flags.name: eval
flags.description: Codebase-reading eval aggregate (N/total passing, citation_rate p50)

flags.name: expand
flags.description: Small-LLM-generated multi-line summary of current state

flags.name: format
flags.description: Output format: claude (Claude Code stdin variant of the default one-liner)

flags.name: json
flags.description: Emit raw storage stats as JSON

tools.name: study
tools.description: Spend N seconds/minutes/hours learning the project via the study DAG

flags.name: density
flags.description: Sample density for --sample-only: sparse | normal | dense | <int k>

flags.name: dry-run
flags.description: Plan only — print derivation, don't call LLM

flags.name: endpoint
flags.description: OpenAI-compat base URL transient override (bypasses model_routes)

flags.name: focus-lines
flags.description: Bias the sample toward a START,END line range

flags.name: focus-path
flags.description: Bias the sample toward a file or subdirectory (DIR studies)

flags.name: force
flags.description: Wipe per-file coverage before running (re-extract everything)

flags.name: goal
flags.description: Task hint passed to inference / the curator when studying a FILE or DIR

flags.name: max-passes
flags.description: Max deepening passes when studying a FILE or DIR

flags.name: sample-only
flags.description: Mechanically sample a FILE or DIR (sampler only, no LLM) and print the chunk table

flags.name: target-coverage
flags.description: Override the derived halt-target (eff_loc AND files ≥ this)

flags.name: window
flags.description: Consuming-model context window in tokens for --sample-only (default: conservative)

flags.name: window-lines
flags.description: Override the derived chunk window size in lines

flags.name: window-overlap
flags.description: Override the derived adjacent-chunk overlap in lines

tools.name: test
tools.description: Test LLM analysis quality

tools.name: tools
tools.description: Generate the tools.json manifest from the command registry

flags.name: check
flags.description: Verify the committed manifest matches the generator output; exit 1 on drift

flags.name: out
flags.description: Path to write manifest to (use '-' for stdout)

flags.name: version
flags.description: Version string stamped on tools without their own SurfaceVersion (defaults to binary version)

tools.name: uninstall
tools.description: Remove the current project's .cortex/ data (--purge required to delete)

flags.name: purge
flags.description: Remove .cortex/ directory and all captured data
